An '''unidentified [[Grand Protector/Legends|Grand Protector]]''' oversaw an honor duel between [[Jannik (Rodian)|Jannik the White]] and [[Evo]] the Blue on [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]] in [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]]. He consecrated the armor of the battle himself, and had [[Loreli Ro]] observe the battle with him as a guest of honor.

==Appearances==
*[[Starfighter: Crossbones 1|''Starfighter: Crossbones'' 1]] {{1st}}
